notes: v1.14.120 - B4 fix (UI walkthrough BUGS list, Rule C — no dead interstitials). Work>Deploy card landed on a dead 'OPEN DEPLOY ->' launcher stub instead of the dashboard: the DEPLOY rf-card onclick was showWorkTab('deploy'), which shows #wk-deploy's static stub ('DEPLOYMENT COMMAND' + an 'Open Deploy ->' button that itself calls deploy_quick()). That's a wasted tap + screen (fails Cold-Aisle Gate 3 / Rule C). FIX: point the card onclick at deploy_goToDashboard(null) - its redesign branch does showWorkTab('deploy') + deploy_showCommandCenter(deploy_opsHost()), landing DIRECTLY on the Command Center (BUILD LEAD · Command Center · LIST · +NEW, multi-deploy view). One-line handler change; markup/JS unchanged elsewhere; the stub markup stays as a harmless fallback (now always overwritten on entry). Browser-verified at 412x915: card tap -> Command Center (LIST/+NEW), no stub, grid exited, no console errors. #pg-work/redesign-only; legacy (?legacy=1) untouched. NOTE: the Command-page Deploy launcher (cmd_route 'work','deploy') and Stage-2 graceful-degrades still route via showWorkTab('deploy') to the stub - acceptable for now (not B4's flagged surface); fold into a follow-up if John wants every Deploy entry to skip the stub. B2 (ON SHIFT pill float) remains a UI-sweep item. node --check x3 + sw.js, brace gate, three-stamp lockstep, CRLF-preserving. DEVICE-VERIFY: Work grid -> tap DEPLOY -> lands on Command Center (LIST/+NEW) with no middle 'Open Deploy' screen; ?legacy=1 unchanged.
